Name: T(3,2)
Further Information: Fundamental group of trefoil knot complement, three strand braid group

Name: \pi_1(N_3)
Further Information: Fundamental group of non-orientable surface of genus 3

Name: G(1,2)
Further Information: Baumslag-Gersten group. Every quotient group is cyclic, not residually finite, Hopfian, co-Hopfian
References: A Non-cyclic One-relator Group all of Whose Finite Quotients are Cyclic, Gilbert Baumslag
